title: agent.json
description: Capability manifest for the agent internet. Declares what a service offers to AI agents, how to interact with it, and where to send payments.

origin.description: The domain this manifest represents. Must match the domain serving the file.

payout_address.description: Wallet address for receiving payments. Currently USDC on Base L2.

description.description: Brief description of the service. Used for semantic discovery.

extensions.description: Vendor-specific extension namespaces. Runtimes should ignore unknown namespaces.

intents.description: Array of capabilities the service offers to agents.

bounty.description: Default bounty the provider pays runtimes per intent completion. Acts as an advertisement to incentivize agent routing. Can be overridden per-intent.

incentive.description: Default suggested incentive the provider requests from runtimes per intent completion. Runtimes decide independently whether to honor this. Can be overridden per-intent.

x402.description: x402 payment discovery metadata. Declares that this provider supports x402 (HTTP 402) payment negotiation. Enables agents to discover payment capabilities before making a request.

Identity.description: Provider identity metadata. Signing and verification behavior are not standardized in v1.0.

public_key.description: Base64url-encoded public key material advertised by the provider.

Intent.description: A single capability the service offers to agents.

name.description: Machine-readable identifier. Must be snake_case, unique within the manifest.

description.description: Natural-language description of the capability. Used for semantic matching — be specific.

extensions.description: Vendor-specific extension namespaces for this intent. Runtimes should ignore unknown namespaces.

endpoint.description: API endpoint URL for direct execution. Absolute URL or path relative to origin. When present, the runtime calls this endpoint directly instead of web automation.

method.description: HTTP method for the endpoint. Required when endpoint is present.

parameters.description: Map of parameter names to parameter definitions. For GET: query params. For POST/PUT: JSON body.

returns.description: Description of the response shape. Helps agents understand what to expect.

price.description: What the provider charges to access this intent. When present, the runtime must arrange payment before or during execution.

bounty.description: Per-intent bounty override. What the provider pays the runtime for completing this intent. Takes priority over manifest-level bounty.

incentive.description: Per-intent incentive override. Suggested amount the provider requests the runtime pay for fulfilling this intent. Takes priority over manifest-level incentive.

x402.description: Per-intent x402 payment metadata. Overrides or extends root-level x402 configuration for this intent.

Extensions.description: Open object for vendor-specific extension namespaces, e.g. `extensions.air`.

Returns.description: Description of what an intent returns.

properties.description: For object type: map of property names to type and description.

Parameter.description: An input parameter for an intent.

default.description: Default value when not provided by the agent.

Price.description: What the provider charges to access an intent.

amount.description: Cost per call (or per unit) in the specified currency.

currency.description: Pricing currency. USD for fiat, USDC for on-chain.

model.description: Pricing model. per_call (default), per_unit (amount × parameter value), or flat (one-time).

unit_param.description: For per_unit model: which parameter determines the unit count.

free_tier.description: Number of free calls before pricing applies.

network.description: Settlement network(s) for on-chain currencies. A single string or array of strings. Examples: "base", "ethereum", "arbitrum", "optimism", "polygon". Omit for fiat currencies.

X402Root.description: Root-level x402 payment discovery metadata. Declares that this provider supports x402 (HTTP 402) payment negotiation. Use flat fields (network, asset, contract, facilitator) for single-network providers, or the networks array for multi-network support. If networks is present, flat network/asset/contract/facilitator fields are ignored.

supported.description: Whether the provider accepts x402 payment proofs.

network.description: Settlement network for single-network providers. Ignored when networks array is present. Examples: "base", "ethereum".

asset.description: Payment asset for single-network providers. Ignored when networks array is present. Examples: "USDC", "ETH".

contract.description: Token contract address for ERC-20 assets. Required for non-native assets in single-network mode. Ignored when networks array is present.

facilitator.description: URL of the x402 facilitator service for payment verification. Used in single-network mode. Ignored when networks array is present.

recipient.description: Recipient address for x402 payments. Defaults to the manifest's payout_address if omitted.

networks.description: Multi-network x402 configuration. Each entry declares settlement details for one blockchain network. When present, flat fields (network, asset, contract, facilitator) are ignored.

X402NetworkConfig.description: x402 settlement configuration for a single blockchain network.

asset.description: Payment asset accepted on this network. Examples: "USDC", "ETH".

contract.description: Token contract address for ERC-20 assets on this network. Required for non-native assets.

facilitator.description: URL of the x402 facilitator service for payment verification on this network.

X402Intent.description: Per-intent x402 payment metadata. Overrides or extends root-level x402 configuration for this specific intent.

supported.description: Override the root-level supported flag for this intent.

direct_price.description: Price per request when paying directly via x402 (no session ticket). Applies to all networks unless overridden by network_pricing.

ticket_price.description: Discounted price per request when using a prepaid session ticket. Applies to all networks unless overridden by network_pricing.

description.description: Human-readable explanation of x402 pricing for this intent.

network_pricing.description: Per-network price overrides. Only needed when costs genuinely differ across chains. Entries override the top-level direct_price/ticket_price for the specified network.

X402NetworkPricing.description: Per-network x402 pricing override for an intent.

network.description: Blockchain network this pricing applies to. Must match a network declared in the root x402 configuration.

direct_price.description: Network-specific price per request when paying directly via x402.

ticket_price.description: Network-specific discounted price per request when using a prepaid session ticket.

Bounty.description: What the provider pays the runtime per successful intent completion. Acts as an advertisement to incentivize agent traffic routing.

type.description: Bounty model. Currently only 'cpa' (cost per action).

rate.description: Amount the provider pays per successful completion.

Incentive.description: Suggested amount the provider requests runtimes pay per successful intent fulfillment. Purely opt-in — runtimes decide independently whether and how much to honor.

type.description: Incentive model. Currently only 'cpa' (cost per action).

rate.description: Suggested incentive amount per successful fulfillment.

Splits.description: Distribution of the bounty payout among runtime parties. All values must sum to 1.0.

orchestrator.description: Executing agent's share of the bounty.

referrer.description: Referring agent or discovery layer share.
